name: dMY Technology Group, Inc.
description: dMY Technology Group, Inc. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of entering into a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company focuses on identifying businesses in the consumer technology sector, including gaming, entertainment, education, e-commerce, dating, and health and wellness, with an enterprise value of approximately $500 million to $1.5 billion.
